issues.description: First ability missing cost condition: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] DON!! −1 requires a condition checking DON!! spend of 1, not just 'Activated' trigger. Should include cost/resource check.

Second ability condition is 'Always' but text states 'If the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field' — requires comparison condition, not Always.

Action should attach/rest the DON!! (GiveDon + Rest combined, or AttachDon with rest state), not just GiveDon. Text says 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it' — requires both attach and rest actions.
